title: Quick Input
description: Paste KOL investment opinion articles to quickly add them to the database

inputCard.title: Enter Article Content
inputCard.description: Paste article content or URL, the system will automatically identify KOLs and investment targets
inputCard.placeholder:
Paste KOL post content or article URL...

For example:
- Directly paste Facebook / Twitter post content
- Paste article URL (supports auto-extraction)
- Manually enter opinion summary

urlDetection.notSupported: This URL platform does not support auto-extraction yet
urlDetection.manualInput: Please paste the article content directly instead...

tips.title: Usage Tips
tips.description: Supports directly pasting Facebook, Twitter, Threads post URLs...
